cards.name: [Onboarding] Refactor payment_parser to match test spec
cards.desc:
test_payment_parser.py specifies a new API that the current PaymentParser implementation does not satisfy. Tests are skipped until this is implemented.

Required changes:
- Module-level parse_pagos_xlsx(content: bytes) function
- result.validas / result.invalidas (rename valid_rows / invalid_rows)
- row.fila (rename row_num), row.rut_cliente_raw (new field)
- RUT normalization (remove dots/spaces) and check-digit validation
- referencia, folio_documento, tipo_documento become REQUIRED fields
- VALID_PAYMENT_METHODS validation (efectivo/transferencia/cheque/tarjeta/otro)
- VALID_DOCUMENT_TYPES validation (factura/boleta/nota_credito/nota_debito/guia_despacho)
- error.motivo (joined error string), error.valores_raw (dict of raw values)
- Blank row skipping
- Remove documentation-row skip (row[1]) — template no longer needs it
- Update onboarding_payments.py to use new API
- Unskip test_payment_parser.py once implementation is done
checklist: Remove documentation-row skip from parse logic
Update onboarding_payments.py to use new API names
Run full test suite, confirm all pass
